name: Showtape
description: Multi-pane in-container demo recorder. Installs the `showtape` CLI plus its system dependencies (Playwright/Chromium, VHS, ttyd, FFmpeg, Piper) so any project's devcontainer can render narrated demo MP4s from a YAML spec.

version.description: Git ref of scottrigby/showtape to install (branch, tag, or commit).

voiceModel.description: Piper voice to pre-fetch into /usr/local/share/showtape/voices/. Empty string disables pre-fetch.

installChromium.description: Install Playwright's bundled Chromium and its apt-level system deps. Disable to keep the image small if you only intend to use terminal panes.
